race.description: Prydes Easifeed Free For All Trot
race.comment: MECARNO (4) was the star of the Victorian three-year-old colts and gelding ranks last season, heading to the paddock off six straight wins. They included the Victoria Derby and the Vicbred and Breeders Crown finals, all at Group 1 level. Hasn't raced since December and tackling older rivals is a new challenge he was readied with a trial win. IM BOBBY (6) was a big improver when second-up last week, drawing on the back row but using the sprint lane for a 1.8m win at this venue. Big chance to strike again. ARCEE PHOENIX (11) hasn't raced since finishing fifth to superstar Keayang Zahara in the Great Southern Star in February but he has won three of five fresh attempts and was readied with two trials. Tricky draw but he is rarely out of the money at this circuit and distance so must be respected. KEAYANG STUKA (9) draws on the back row but cannot be left out after recording a win and a placing so far this campaign.
